nasb.text: Joshua said, “Roll large stones against the mouth of the cave, and assign men by it to guard them,

esv.text: And Joshua said, “Roll large stones against the mouth of the cave and set men by it to guard them,

cnv.text: 約書亞說：“你們把幾塊大石頭輥到洞口那裡去，並派人到洞口去看守他們。

ccb.text: 约书亚便下令说：“滚几块大石头堵住洞口，派人看守。
